mapper.sql: id, name, code, type, scope_value, custom_sql, description, tenant_id, enabled, is_delete, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_data_domain WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0

SELECT
FROM sys_data_domain WHERE is_delete = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_data_domain(name, code, type, scope_value, custom_sql, description, tenant_id, enabled) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{type}, #{scopeValue}, #{customSql}, #{description}, #{tenantId}, COALESCE(#{enabled}, 1))
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_data_domain SET name = #{name}, code = COALESCE(#{code}, code), type = #{type}, scope_value = #{scopeValue}, custom_sql = #{customSql}, description = #{description}, tenant_id = #{tenantId}, enabled = #{enabled} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE sys_data_domain SET is_delete = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_data_domain WHERE is_delete = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_data_domain WHERE is_delete = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_data_domain SET name = #{dataDomain.name}, code = COALESCE(#{dataDomain.code}, code), type = #{dataDomain.type}, scope_value = #{dataDomain.scopeValue}, custom_sql = #{dataDomain.customSql}, description = #{dataDomain.description}, enabled = #{dataDomain.enabled} WHERE id = #{dataDomainId} AND is_delete = 0
mapper.select: SELECT d.* FROM sys_data_domain d INNER JOIN sys_role_data_domain rd ON rd.data_domain_id = d.id WHERE rd.role_id = #{roleId} AND rd.is_delete = 0 AND d.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY d.id ASC
mapper.delete: UPDATE sys_role_data_domain SET is_delete = 1 WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND is_delete = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_role_data_domain(role_id, data_domain_id, is_delete) VALUES
(#{roleId}, #{ddid}, 0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_delete = 0
